north.description: Warm, relatively dry coastal area. Good for tropical fruits and warm-season vegetables.

south.description: Cooler and wetter than north. Excellent for cool-season vegetables and tea.

east.description: Windward side with regular rainfall. Good drainage needed. Suits most vegetables.

west.description: Driest and warmest region. Best for drought-tolerant crops and tropical fruits.

central.description: Central plateau — coolest and wettest. Ideal for temperate vegetables year-round.
